# qiniu_compute_region (Data Source)

用于查询 Qiniu LAS 单个区域详情的数据源



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) 区域 ID，未指定时使用 provider 级别配置的 region_id
- `language` (String) 返回区域名称的语言，默认为 zh-CN
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `region` (Attributes) 区域详情 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region))

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) 一个可被解析为持续时间的字符串（参考 time.ParseDuration 文档），由数字和单位后缀组成，例如 "30s" 或 "2h45m"。有效的时间单位包括："s"（秒） "m"（分钟） "h"（小时）。读取操作发生在任何刷新或计划操作期间，当启用刷新时。


<a id="nestedatt--region"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region`

Read-Only:

- `features` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features))
- `id` (String) 区域 ID
- `is_china_mainland` (Boolean) 是否为中国大陆区域
- `name` (String) 区域名称

<a id="nestedatt--region--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features`

Read-Only:

- `cpu` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--cpu))
- `ebs` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--ebs))
- `gpu` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--gpu))
- `network` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--network))
- `public_access_http_proxy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--public_access_http_proxy))
- `rfs` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--rfs))
- `sandbox` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--sandbox))

<a id="nestedatt--region--features--cpu"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.cpu`

Read-Only:

- `creation_disabled` (Boolean) 是否禁止新建 CPU 资源
- `state` (String) CPU 资源状态
- `supported` (Boolean) 是否支持 CPU 资源


<a id="nestedatt--region--features--ebs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.ebs`

Read-Only:

- `state` (String) EBS 资源状态
- `supported` (Boolean) 是否支持 EBS


<a id="nestedatt--region--features--gpu"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.gpu`

Read-Only:

- `creation_disabled` (Boolean) 是否禁止新建 GPU 资源
- `state` (String) GPU 资源状态
- `supported` (Boolean) 是否支持 GPU 资源


<a id="nestedatt--region--features--network"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.network`

Read-Only:

- `isolated` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--network--isolated))
- `standard` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--network--standard))
- `vpc` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--region--features--network--vpc))

<a id="nestedatt--region--features--network--isolated"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.network.isolated`

Read-Only:

### Nested Schema for `region.features.network.standard`

Read-Only:

- `supported` (Boolean) 是否支持标准网络


<a id="nestedatt--region--features--network--vpc"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region.features.network.vpc`

Read-Only:

- `supported` (Boolean) 是否支持 VPC 网络

### Nested Schema for `region.features.public_access_http_proxy`

Read-Only:

Read-Only:
